name: Rolled: A Pinball Nightmare
short_description: A pinball horror adventure game. You will bounce and ping your way through a nonlinear world in hopes to get back to the life you were living before.
detailed_description:
A game for people who love pinball as much as they hate themselves.

Rolled: A Pinball Nightmare is a pinball horror adventure game. You will bounce and ping your way through a nonlinear world in hopes to get back to the life you were living before.

Features

  • Challenging pinball-based gameplay
  • An interconnected world to explore
  • 8 unique boss encounters
  • A colorful cast of characters
  • An assortment of power-ups to aid you in your journey
  • 3 endings
